commands.review_summary:
This PR replaces OpenClaw's in-repo Photon image operations with a small `@openclaw/prism` adapter and updates dependency pinning, shrinkwrap generation, and image/media tests.

PR surface: Source -1882, Tests -101, Config -2, Other +22. Total -1963 across 19 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review blockers: source inspection shows the pinned Prism archive lacks the exported `dist/` files and Prism creates native temp dirs under `os.tmpdir()`. No runtime command was run because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/security review plus Prism-side package/API work, so it is not a safe single-repo automated repair lane.

target.title: refactor: use Prism for image processing
target.body:
## Summary

- Move OpenClaw image processing to `@openclaw/prism`, pinned to `openclaw/prism@a3e529dc060f08a8aab12f01510a74c14e0ef48e`.
- Delete the bundled media-understanding Photon image shim and keep `src/media/image-ops.ts` as a small Prism adapter.
- Preserve trusted native tool resolution, `windows-native` aliases, best-effort EXIF normalization, input/output pixel limits, and shrinkwrap/pin guard compatibility for commit-pinned GitHub tarballs.

## Verification

- Prism: `pnpm check && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm pack --pack-destination /tmp/prism-pack`
- Prism CI: https://github.com/openclaw/prism/actions/runs/26412865707
- OpenClaw TUI PTY: `timeout 120s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`
- OpenClaw focused tests: `pnpm test src/media/image-ops.prism-adapter.test.ts src/media/image-ops.input-guard.test.ts src/media/image-ops.helpers.test.ts src/media/web-media.test.ts src/agents/tool-images.test.ts src/gateway/managed-image-attachments.test.ts test/package-manager-config.test.ts test/scripts/check-dependency-pins.test.ts test/scripts/generate-npm-shrinkwrap.test.ts`
- OpenClaw changed gate/build: `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed && env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm build`
- Auto review: `/Users/steipete/Projects/agent-scripts/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: OpenClaw no longer owns its image-processing Photon implementation directly; core media image operations delegate to Prism while preserving safety and backend behavior.
Real environment tested: macOS local checkout, Node/pnpm repo defaults, real `@openclaw/prism` dependency fetched from the pushed GitHub commit.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm install --lockfile-only`; `pnpm deps:shrinkwrap:root:generate`; `timeout 120s node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.tui-pty.config.ts`; `pnpm test ...`; `env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm check:changed && env -u OPENCLAW_TESTBOX pnpm build`; Prism CI on `a3e529dc060f08a8aab12f01510a74c14e0ef48e`.
Evidence after fix: Prism CI run 26412865707 passed; TUI PTY passed 11 tests; focused OpenClaw tests passed 5 Vitest shards; `check:changed` passed dependency pins, shrinkwrap, typecheck, lint, and import cycles; build completed; autoreview was clean.
Observed result after fix: image metadata/resizing/PNG optimization/agent attachment paths remain green, native fallback commands still route through OpenClaw trusted resolution, shrinkwraps stay aligned with the pinned Prism package, and the TUI fixture can resolve Prism through tsx/Node loader probing.
What was not tested: Windows `windows-native` PowerShell execution was preserved in Prism and typechecked, but not live-run on a Windows host in this local pass.
target.author: steipete
